hooks.command: [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.git" ] || exit 0; if git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" pull --ff-only -q 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ LLM-Wiki: git pull --ff-only done"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ LLM-Wiki: git pull --ff-only failed — manual merge may be needed"}'; fi; exit 0

[ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.git" ] || exit 0; git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" add -A 2>/dev/null; if git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" diff --cached --quiet; then exit 0; fi; if git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" commit -q -m "Auto-sync wiki $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" push -q; then echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ LLM-Wiki: auto-committed & pushed"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ LLM-Wiki: auto commit/push failed — check git status"}'; fi; exit 0
